title: Risers Gemstone
description: Risers Gemstone is a drop-in Minecraft plugin that grants players powerful elemental gems upon joining—no setup, no commands, just polished magic. Customizable, resource-pack powered, and built for smooth server integration.
body:
# **💠 Risers Gemstone – Power Beyond the Ordinary**

Step into the world of RISERS with the legendary **Risers Gemstone** – a mystical Spigot plugin that channels elemental strength, unique abilities, and server-wide influence through 10 distinct gemstones.

![Risers Gemstones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac8d8e820ebea4605d4ef301b0c3d94b2b4f2ac.jpeg)

---

## ⚡ **10 Elemental Gemstones, 10 Unique Powers**

| Gem | Element | Core Abilities |
|:---:|:---:|:---|
| 💧 **Water Gem** | Depths & Currents | Riptide III trident • Empowered effects in water/rain • Reduced damage in Nether |
| ⚡ **Shock Gem** | Storms & Lightning | Loyalty III trident • Summon lightning strikes • Combat buff on activation |
| 🌬️ **Air Gem** | Wind & Freedom | Unlimited Wind Charges • Wind Burst III enchanting • Complete fall immunity |
| 🔥 **Fire Gem** | Flame & Fury | Fire/lava immunity • Combat buffs when ablaze • 1.5x Nether damage boost |
| 💪 **Strength Gem** | Titan's Will | Permanent Strength effect • Sharpness V enchanting |
| 💨 **Speed Gem** | Velocity & Agility | 10-block teleportation (Blink) • Speed effect • Charge-based cooldown system |
| 👻 **Spirit Gem** | Soul & Ethereal | Capture mob spirits on kill • Summon spirit army (up to 5 spirits) |
| 🍀 **Luck Gem** | Fortune & Fate | Looting V / Fortune V enchanting • Permanent Luck effect |
| 💀 **Curse Gem** | Malevolence | Apply Wither & Blindness to foes • 1.5x Nether damage • Overworld penalty |
| 💗 **Healing Gem** | Life Force | +4 extra hearts • Regeneration & Resistance • AoE healing aura |

---

## ✨ **Key Features**

- 🎮 **Intuitive Activation** – Press `Shift + 5 rapid right-clicks` to awaken your gem's power
- 🛡️ **Soulbound Protection** – Gems can't be dropped, lost on death, or stored in containers (configurable)
- 🌍 **Multi-World Support** – Enable/disable gem mechanics per world
- 🎨 **Custom Model Ready** – Designed with CustomModelData for resource pack textures
- 🔄 **Auto-Update Checker** – Stay current with the latest version
- 🗃️ **SQLite Database** – Persistent gem ownership tracking

---

## 📦 **Commands & Permissions**

| Command | Description |
|:---|:---|
| `/gemstone give <player> <gem>` | Give a gemstone to a player |
| `/gemstone take <player> <gem>` | Remove a gemstone from a player |
| `/gemstone reload` | Reload the configuration |

**Permission:** `gemstone.admin` (default: OP)

---

## ⚙️ **Configuration**

```yaml
# Worlds where gemstone mechanics are active
enabled-worlds:
  - world
  - world_nether
  - world_the_end

# Gem protection settings
gem-settings:
  return-on-drop: true      # Prevents dropping gems
  return-on-death: true     # Returns gems on respawn
  return-on-container: true # Blocks storing in chests/hoppers
```

---

## 🔧 **Resource Pack**

For custom gem models and textures, use the official resource pack:
- **[Risers Gemstone Texturepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/risers-gemstone-texture-pack)**

---

## 📋 **Requirements**

- **Minecraft:** 1.21+  
- **Server:** Spigot/Paper  
- **Java:** 21  

---

## 🌟 **Perfect For**

- ⚔️ **RPG Servers** – Unique class-based abilities
- 🏰 **Survival Multiplayer** – Rare rewards for achievements
- 🎁 **Reward Systems** – Integration with crate plugins or events
- 🛒 **Economy Servers** – Tradeable prestige items

---

> *"These aren't just gems... they're fragments of legacy."*  
> — **Dark_Yoddha** | Heir of the Risers Realm

**Will you rise to claim your gem?** 💎
